  "decision": "fail",

  "percent_complete": 90,

  "confidence": 1.0,

  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "DTI squirter washers not fully crushed, indicating the structural bolts have not achieved the required minimum tension."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Tighten the bolts further until the required number of DTI protrusions are compressed and the silicone media squirts out to indicate proper tension.",
    "Verify tension with a feeler gauge per RCSC Specification Section 8.2.4 if visual indication is insufficient."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under the RCSC Specification, Direct Tension Indicators (DTIs) must be compressed to the point where the gap is reduced to the specified refusal dimension, which is visually indicated by the extrusion of silicone in 'squirter' type DTIs. Uncrushed or partially crushed DTIs indicate that the bolts are under-tensioned, which compromises the structural integrity of the slip-critical or tension-controlled joint.",
  "references": [
    "RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, Section 8.2.4"
  ]
}
